mean_cn: v.（通过满足要求而）帮助；（以法律、义务等）迫使，使感激
mean_en: to force somebody to do something, by law, because it is a duty, etc.; to help somebody by doing what they ask or what you know they want
sentence: "If you need anything, just tell us. We'll see if we can oblige."
sentence_trans: “如果你需要什么东西，尽管和我们说。我们会尽量帮忙的。”
word_etyma: ob去 + lig绑 + e  → 去绑住某人  → oblige迫使
